channel.title: Hi! I am Ana Ezquerro 👋. on Ana Ezquerro
channel.description: Recent content in Hi! I am Ana Ezquerro 👋. on Ana Ezquerro

item.description: Education 📚 2019-2023: Data Science and Engineering Degree at University of A Coruña. Honor distinction in the Final Degree Project: “Fully Incremental Parsing based on Neural Networks”. 2023-Present: Master in Artificial Intelligence at University of A Coruña. Experience 💻 07/2021-09/2021 (full-time): Research Assistant at CITIC. Analysis and comparison of cure models against ML techniques in COVID19 data for UCI admission prediction. 09/2021-04/2022 (full-time): Department Collaboration Scholarship (University of A Coruña, MODES Group).

item.title: Awards & Honors 📜
item.description: 2023, University of A Coruña: Extraordinary Degree Award. 2023, Xunta de Galicia: Academic Excellence in University Degrees Award during 2021-2022. 2022, Xunta de Galicia: Academic Excellence in University Degrees Award during 2020-2021 2019, University of Santiago de Compostela: Best Academic Records for University Access in Galicia.

item.title: Hi! I am Ana Ezquerro 👋.
item.description: 💻: I am a Master Student at University of A Coruña and a part-time researcher in the LyS Group. 👩‍🎓: Recently graduated in Data Science and Engineering (2019-2023) and currently enrolled in the first year of the Master in Artificial Intelligence. 🚀: Work & interests: Natural Language Processing, Audio Signal Processing, Multimodal Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Recommender Systems. 🌱: Python as main programming language with proficiency level in Julia, R & SQL and advanced level in Java.

item.title: Research ✒️
item.description: XoveTIC 2022: Automatic covariates selection in dynamic regression models with application to COVID-19 evolution. IJCNLP-AACL 2023: On the Challenges of Fully Incremental Neural Dependency Parsing. Mathematics 2023: On the Reliability of Machine Learning Models for Survival Analysis When Cure Is a Possibility.
